architectReview.evidence: Post-fix architect review agent://7-ArchitectureRerun found no reportable findings: managed MCP boundary, six-provider catalog, Reddit removal, shell-safe local registration, documentation, and real credential-free dist lifecycle are coherent.

executorQa.evidence: Post-fix executor QA agent://8-ExecutorQaRerun covered provider catalog isolation, removed-provider paths, read/write guards, dry-run and credential boundaries, bundled lifecycle, local registration, POSIX shell quoting, and truthful idempotency schema removal. Parent-run CI passed with zero lint warnings, 5 e2e tests, 326 engine tests, and 51 MCP tests.

artifactRefs.description: Focused, full-CI, provider-catalog, registration, and real dist lifecycle evidence

contractCoverage.obligation: All public README languages and Skill surfaces recommend local hyper-cloaking-mcp rather than external Playwright MCP.
Expose exactly six provider capability sets without Reddit, helpers, or blocked actions.
Build and spawn the real distribution server and prove launch/status/teardown without credentials.
Resolve lint warnings without suppressions or weakened tests.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: npm run validate plus multilingual README content inspection
direct handler contracts and real stdio tools/list

adversarialCases.scenario: Search public READMEs for active external @playwright/mcp setup instructions.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: No active legacy operational route remains.

adversarialCases.scenario: Mutate returned provider catalog arrays and request the catalog again.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Fresh six-provider data is returned without injected actions.

adversarialCases.scenario: Use explicit Reddit provider id and Reddit URL through provider tools.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Explicit id is unknown; URL resolves generic and provider actions are refused.

adversarialCases.scenario: Exercise the bundled server rather than a mock while providing no site credentials.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Real launch/status/teardown passes; credential-gated provider calls remain explicitly unclaimed.

adversarialCases.scenario: Run complete lint, format, engine, e2e, validation, and MCP suites after cleanup and review fixes.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Zero lint warnings and all tests pass.

iteration.evidence: AI SLOP CLEANUP REPORT: changed-file diff/search sweep found no blocking fallback masking, duplication, dead code, needless abstraction, boundary violation, UI slop, or missing-test issue. The unavailable internal fragment path was replaced by an equivalent read-only taxonomy sweep. Architect findings on shell quoting and unused idempotencyKey were fixed; full verification and both review lanes reran cleanly.
